note: A Look record: family-generic envelope, gouache-specific payload. `look_family` selects which shader/pipeline reads `params` (gouache.gdshaderinc's gouache_wash() here) — games will not always be gouache. gouache is look #1, not the schema: a game declares its own look by shipping a different record with a different look_family and its own params shape; an unknown family fails LOUDLY (game/world/look_data.gd, Wash's look registry) rather than silently falling back to gouache. E3.3: promoted verbatim from gouache.gdshaderinc's literals (palette, band thresholds, variation frequencies, blotch amplitude, grain mix) — a MOVE, not a retune; the values below are byte-identical to what shipped before this record existed.
